articles.title: Opinion: We need a new social contract for the Information Age
articles.description: Michael Harvey: As B.C.’s privacy commissioner, I believe we need to make sure that our digital world works for us, and not vice versa. That starts with reforming privacy laws that have been strained to the breaking point by new technologies.
